findings.title: Missing License and Compatibility Information
findings.description: The YAML manifest does not specify a license or compatibility information, which are important for understanding the legal and operational context of the skill.
findings.snippet:
- license: Not specified
- compatibility: Not specified
findings.remediation: Specify a license and compatibility information in the YAML manifest to clarify the legal and operational context of the skill.

findings.title: Missing Allowed-Tools Specification
findings.description: The YAML manifest does not specify allowed-tools, which is optional but recommended for clarity on what tools the skill is permitted to use.
findings.remediation: Consider specifying allowed-tools in the YAML manifest to clarify what tools the skill is permitted to use.

findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
findings.description: Skill manifest does not include a 'license' field. Specifying a license helps users understand usage terms.
findings.remediation: Add 'license' field to SKILL.md frontmatter (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

scan_metadata.llm_overall_assessment: The skill 'api-docs-gen' is generally safe but lacks some important metadata in the YAML manifest, such as license, compatibility, and allowed-tools. These omissions are low severity but should be addressed to ensure clarity and compliance with best practices.
